summary: Added floating Dataset tab pop-out windows.
details: Right-clicking a Dataset tab now temporarily moves the live tab page into a draggable, resizable floating window, matching the DFM tab pop-out behavior.
The Dataset pop-out uses the shared tab pop-out logic so controls, event handlers, and data state remain live in the floating tab.
The Dataset Chart tab redraws after pop-out, docking, focus, and resize so the canvas fits the floating window.
